label: Anslem
description: Anslem serves as the primary world of Gaardia, containing the continent of Muraii with its successor kingdoms, disputed frontiers, and coastlines shaped by continent-scale catastrophe. Its geography bears enduring scars of collapse—ruinfields, re-founded cities, and fortified trade corridors—where legitimacy, law, and ecclesiastical authority remain contested institutions. The planet also anchors the layered liminal realms of Ahm’a, Limbo, Pandemonium, and the Fire Deep, whose recurrent anomalies breach into the material landscape and leave codified zones of hazard and interdiction.
